title: Distinct Subsequences Count
hints: Consider how the solution changes if you remove the last character of s. Does it help to build the answer by processing s one character at a time?
Use dynamic programming with a 2D table where rows represent prefixes of s and columns represent prefixes of t.
Each cell stores the count of ways to form the current t-prefix using the current s-prefix. Handle the base case where t is empty carefully.
